shared_attributes.position: center of 128x128 screen, on perch at y=60
shared_attributes.key_features: crest, cheek patch, tail - 3 essential cockatiel traits

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Triggered when cage has 3+ poop on floor (uncleaned)
context.usage_scenario: Indicates cage needs cleaning. Echo looks uncomfortable. Remains until player swipes floor to clean. Happiness decreases over time in this state.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with slightly hunched posture, uncomfortable expression
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with hand-drawn organic edges, no gradients

animation.description: Frame 1: Normal uncomfortable posture. Frame 2: Slight shift left. Frame 3: Slight shift right. Fidgeting motion showing discomfort.

visual_specification.details: Crest: slightly drooped (not fully raised or flat). Eyes: half-closed or showing discomfort (2x1px instead of 2x2px). Body: hunched, 2-3px lower than normal. Dust particles (1x1px #C2C3C7) float around Echo, 3-4 particles visible at any time. Fidget motion: 1-2px horizontal shift.

relationships.shared_with: Same base colors as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle: hunched vs upright, half-closed eyes vs open, dust particles present vs clean. echo_sleeping: eyes half-closed vs hidden, upright vs tucked.

explicit_negations: Echo does not turn brown or change body color
No visible dirt on feathers (only dust particles around)
No smell lines or stink waves
